belier.intro: The Moon has advanced to 28 degrees Libra, nearly closing out the sign entirely, and the First Quarter light now burns at just over half full in your seventh house, sharpening yesterday's tension into something closer to decision. Mercury retrograde in Cancer continues stirring your fourth house, but the conversation that felt unfinished yesterday is closer to resolution now. The Cancer Sun holds steady, reminding you that the ground beneath a partnership matters as much as the partnership itself.
belier.love: Whatever you named honestly yesterday now asks for a decision rather than more discussion. The late-degree Moon favors closing a loop over reopening it; choose the direction and commit to it.
belier.work: A negotiation that felt open-ended is ready to reach an actual agreement today. Push gently toward conclusion rather than letting the conversation drift into another round of the same points.
belier.energy: Your fire has settled from friction into resolve, a sharper and more directed flame than yesterday's. Use it to finish what you started rather than to open something new.
belier.intuition: A decision about a partnership that has felt unclear becomes suddenly obvious today. Trust the clarity; it has been building since yesterday and does not need further testing.
belier.mantra: I close the loop and move forward with resolve.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra nears the end of its passage through your sixth house, and the First Quarter climbing past half illumination asks you to finish, not just identify, what needs fixing in your routines. Mercury retrograde in Cancer continues to surface old tasks through your third house, but today favors closing them out rather than simply reviewing them again. The Cancer Sun keeps your daily contacts warm even as the pressure to actually adjust something intensifies.
taureau.love: A practical fix you identified yesterday is ready to be carried out today rather than discussed further. Follow through on the small gesture; its timing matters more than its size.
taureau.work: The process you flagged as inefficient yesterday deserves an actual change today, not another day of observation. Earth's patience pays off only when it eventually becomes earth's action.
taureau.energy: Your body asks for completion today, one task finished cleanly rather than three left half done. The late-degree Moon rewards follow-through over further deliberation.
taureau.intuition: Your instinct about which habit to release, first raised yesterday, is now ready to be acted on. Stop weighing it and simply let it go.
taureau.mantra: I follow through on what I already know needs doing.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra completes its arc through your fifth house as the First Quarter passes the halfway mark, giving yesterday's creative spark a chance to become something more deliberate. Mercury retrograde in Cancer still moves through your second house, but a financial or self-worth question raised earlier this week is closer to resolving into a clear answer. The Cancer Sun steadies your first house, anchoring your identity as the creative risks around you increase.
gemeaux.love: The lightness you found with someone yesterday deserves a second, more grounded expression today, not just a repeat of playfulness but a genuine step toward each other. Let the fun deepen into something with more weight.
gemeaux.work: The creative idea you voiced yesterday is ready for a next concrete step, an outline, a draft, a real proposal, even while Mercury retrograde still counsels patience before signing anything financial.
gemeaux.energy: Air settles today into a more focused current than yesterday's restlessness. Choose the one idea most worth developing and give it your full attention rather than dividing it further.
gemeaux.intuition: A recurring thought about your own value, financial or creative, is nearing a genuine answer. Let today's clarity replace yesterday's simple hunch.
gemeaux.mantra: I give my best idea the full attention it deserves.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra completes its pass through your fourth house as the First Quarter approaches its half-full peak, and the domestic conversation you opened yesterday is ready for its resolution today. Mercury retrograde in your own sign continues to loop back through unfinished emotional business, but the Cancer Sun gives you unusual authority to speak the final, necessary word on the matter. Neptune retrograde in Aries continues quietly softening ambitions you no longer need to hold so tightly.
cancer.love: The honest conversation about home that began yesterday reaches something closer to resolution today. Say the concluding sentence rather than reopening the whole discussion from the start.
cancer.work: Whatever domestic friction disrupted your focus yesterday has room to settle today if you address it directly one final time. A short, clear conversation closes more than a long, careful one.
cancer.energy: Water settles from yesterday's turbulence into something calmer and more contained. Let the emotional undertow finish its work rather than stirring it further.
cancer.intuition: A family pattern that resurfaced yesterday is ready to be understood rather than merely felt. The insight you have been circling is close enough now to name plainly.
cancer.mantra: I say the final word and let the rest settle.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra finishes its transit of your third house as the First Quarter nears half strength, and the careful words you chose yesterday can now be spoken with more confidence. The Cancer Sun continues warming your twelfth house, keeping a layer of private reflection alive beneath your outward exchanges. Mercury retrograde in Cancer still complicates a private matter, but today favors action over further hesitation.
lion.love: The message you drafted carefully yesterday is ready to be sent or spoken today. Trust that the care you already took is sufficient; further editing only delays what wants to be said.
lion.work: A local negotiation or short-range plan that stalled yesterday can move forward today with the clarifying question you asked already answered. Proceed with the information you now have.
lion.energy: Your fire burns more evenly today, ready to carry through on yesterday's careful groundwork rather than start over. Momentum favors you now.
lion.intuition: The private worry you sat with yesterday has clarified into something you can act on. Trust the shape it has taken rather than second-guessing it further.
lion.mantra: I trust the care I already took and move forward.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra finishes its pass through your second house as the First Quarter approaches half illumination, and the question of your own worth that surfaced yesterday is ready for a clearer answer today. The Cancer Sun continues to favor your eleventh house of friendship and belonging, while Mercury retrograde stirs one more old financial detail into view before it settles. Trust that today brings resolution rather than repetition.
vierge.love: The needs you named plainly yesterday deserve a partner's real response today. Give the conversation room to conclude rather than circling back to restate what has already been heard.
vierge.work: The financial conversation you initiated yesterday is ready for its answer. Follow up directly rather than waiting for the other side to reopen it on their own timeline.
vierge.energy: Earth firms up today into quiet confidence rather than yesterday's careful caution. Let your grounded instincts carry a decision through to completion.
vierge.intuition: The number or figure that kept recurring yesterday now points toward a specific, actionable answer. Act on it rather than continuing to weigh it.
vierge.mantra: I act on the answer I have already found.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon completes its long transit of your own sign today at 28 degrees Libra, the First Quarter light now past half full, and this final stretch through your first house asks you to consolidate what you have learned about yourself this week rather than keep questioning it. Venus, your ruler, favors integration now over further searching. The Cancer Sun in your tenth house continues to hold your public direction quietly in view as your personal clarity peaks.
balance.love: What you dared to want out loud yesterday is ready to be lived rather than merely stated. Let your actions today match the honesty you found then.
balance.work: Your own initiative from yesterday deserves a concrete next step today rather than a return to consensus-seeking. The directness you found under pressure is worth keeping even now that the pressure has eased.
balance.energy: Air settles into a calmer, more centered current as the Moon prepares to leave your sign. Use this last stretch of clarity before the mood shifts elsewhere.
balance.intuition: The sense of self you touched yesterday, separate from what pleases others, is ready to become a lasting decision rather than a passing insight.
balance.mantra: I live today what I understood about myself yesterday.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra completes its quiet pass through your twelfth house as the First Quarter climbs toward half full, and whatever surfaced in yesterday's retreat is now ready to be understood rather than simply felt. Pluto retrograde in Aquarius continues its slow restructuring of your fourth house, while the Cancer Sun in your ninth house widens your perspective just enough to make sense of what emerged in the quiet.
scorpion.love: The unspoken truth you sat with yesterday is ready for a smaller, careful expression today, not a full confession necessarily, but an acknowledgment that something real is present between you.
scorpion.work: The quiet preparation you did yesterday is ready to inform a decision today. Let the solitude have done its work rather than second-guessing what became clear in it.
scorpion.energy: Water settles from yesterday's inward pull into something steadier and more usable. The depth remains, but it is easier to carry today.
scorpion.intuition: The dream or impression you noted yesterday now connects to something concrete in your waking life. Look for the link rather than dismissing the coincidence.
scorpion.mantra: I let yesterday's quiet insight guide today's step.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra finishes its transit of your eleventh house as the First Quarter nears half strength, bringing the question of belonging that opened yesterday closer to a real answer. Neptune retrograde continues its long, patient work in your own sign, while the Cancer Sun in your eighth house keeps deeper intimacy quietly present beneath your social considerations. Today favors a decision about where your energy truly belongs.
sagittaire.love: What a friendship or a partner's circle reflected back to you yesterday is ready to be acted on today, whether that means leaning in further or gently stepping back. Trust the clarity you already have.
sagittaire.work: The friction in a group project that you named yesterday deserves a concrete resolution today. Propose the adjustment rather than simply describing the problem again.
sagittaire.energy: Fire narrows today from broad enthusiasm into a single worthwhile direction. Commit to the group or effort that has actually earned your energy.
sagittaire.intuition: Your sense of which community deserves your continued investment is clearer today than yesterday. Let that clarity guide an actual choice.
sagittaire.mantra: I invest my energy where it is genuinely returned.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra completes its transit of your tenth house as the First Quarter passes the halfway point, and the visibility that pressed on you yesterday now asks for a clear, considered move rather than more waiting. Saturn's steady discipline continues to serve you well, while the Cancer Sun in your seventh house keeps a close partnership in parallel focus as your public direction sharpens.
capricorne.love: The tension you named yesterday between ambition and partnership deserves a concrete resolution today, a plan both of you can actually live with, rather than another round of careful diplomacy.
capricorne.work: The professional decision under scrutiny yesterday is ready to be made. Trust the calm you have already demonstrated; it has prepared you for exactly this moment.
capricorne.energy: Earth's patience converts today into decisive, quiet action. Let your steadiness produce a visible result rather than remaining simply reassuring.
capricorne.intuition: The certainty about your next professional move that was building yesterday is now specific enough to act on. Do not wait for further confirmation.
capricorne.mantra: I convert my patience into a decisive step forward.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra completes its pass through your ninth house as the First Quarter climbs past half illumination, and the larger question about belief or direction that opened yesterday asks for a specific decision today rather than further contemplation. Uranus continues to stir welcome restlessness, while Pluto retrograde deepens its long transformation through your own sign. The Cancer Sun in your sixth house keeps practical matters present without eclipsing your broader vision.
verseau.love: The difference in worldview named yesterday deserves a concrete next step today, a plan for how you will hold that difference together rather than simply acknowledging it exists.
verseau.work: The bigger plan you considered yesterday, travel, publishing, expanding your reach, is ready for one committed action today. Momentum favors follow-through over further contemplation.
verseau.energy: Air settles from yesterday's restless reaching into a more purposeful direction. Use it to act on the perspective you gained rather than seeking a new one.
verseau.intuition: The conviction about your life's direction that felt solid yesterday is ready to inform a real decision today. Let it guide something specific rather than remaining a feeling.
verseau.mantra: I turn my larger vision into one real step.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon at 28 degrees Libra completes its intense passage through your eighth house as the First Quarter nears half strength, and the emotional or financial truth that surfaced yesterday is ready to be named plainly rather than felt only as undertow. Neptune, your ruler, remains retrograde in Aries, still reshaping old ambitions, while the Cancer Sun in your fifth house offers a genuine counterbalance of ease and creative pleasure.
poissons.love: What you named about a shared arrangement yesterday deserves an actual agreement today. Let the honesty already spoken become a concrete understanding between you.
poissons.work: The financial clarity you sought yesterday in a joint account or partnership is ready to be finalized today. Do not let the ambiguity linger simply because naming it once felt like enough.
poissons.energy: Water calms today from yesterday's turbulence into something more workable and clear. The intensity has done its job; let it recede.
poissons.intuition: The psychological truth about a close bond that emerged yesterday is ready to be trusted fully today, not just felt but acted upon in some small, concrete way.
poissons.mantra: I turn what I felt yesterday into clarity today.
poissons.author: Sibylle
